Defendants Thor Aye And Lyn Aye'S Motion For An Order To Compel Responses To Request For Document Production, Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher Dolan, Dolan Law Firm, 415.421.2800, appearing for the Plaintiff;
David P. Lane, Law Offices of Gregory V. DeBernard, appearing for the Defendants.

Matter argued. Ruling: Defendants Thor Aye And Lyn Aye's Motion For An Order To Compel Responses To Request For Document Production, Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions is Granted in part. Sanctions of $250.00 are awarded. Plaintiff's Counsel is to prepare the order. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Compel Responses To Request For Document Production, Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions;
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: David P. Lane, Esq. of Law Offices of Gregory V. DeBernard (925-977-1400) by appearing telephonically for THOR WYNN AYE and LYN S. AYE, defendants and moving parties; No other appearances.

RULING - The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS THOR AYE and LYN AYE'S Motion for an Order to Compel Responses to Request for Document Production, Answers to Interrogatories and for Sanctions is Continued on the court's own motion to May 9, 2013 to give Defendants the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendants must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than [current hearing date] at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge Pro Tem: Philip M. Andersen; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
